sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Applied Digital reports Q3 adjusted EPS 9c, consensus (10c)
feed.summary: Applied Digital (APLD) reported Q3 adjusted EPS of 9 cents, exceeding the consensus estimate of -10 cents. The company also announced Q3 revenue of $126.6 million, with adjusted revenue at $108.6 million, significantly surpassing the consensus of $76.53 million. CEO Wes Cummins highlighted the operational success of their 100 MW liquid-cooled data center and the emerging earnings power of their platform.

feed.title: APOG Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: This article provides a financial analysis of Apogee Enterprises Inc (APOG), detailing its revenue breakdown, profitability margins, and a comparison with competitors JBI and NX. It highlights that Architectural Metals is APOG's largest revenue contributor at 39.3%, and examines the company's gross, operating, and net margins, along with its Return on Equity. The article concludes by benchmarking APOG's financial performance, particularly its gross margin, against its industry rivals.

feed.title: American Healthcare REIT Amends and Extends 2026 Credit Facility
feed.summary: American Healthcare REIT, Inc. (AHR) has amended and extended its 2026 credit facility, through its operating partnership, executing a second amendment to its existing 2024 credit agreement. This update extends the maturity of revolving loans to April 1, 2030, sets current borrowing capacity at $1.35 billion, and maintains term loans maturing January 19, 2027. Analysts currently rate AHR as a Buy with a $55.00 price target, while TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates it Neutral due to strong financial trajectory and earnings momentum offset by valuation risk.

feed.title: Microsoft Corporation $MSFT is Mn Services Vermogensbeheer B.V.'s 4th Largest Position

feed.title: Texas Instruments upgraded to Buy from Hold at Stifel
feed.summary: Stifel has upgraded Texas Instruments (TXN) to a Buy rating from Hold, increasing its price target to $250 from $215. The firm believes that after a six-year investment cycle that constrained profitability, Texas Instruments is now well-positioned to gain market share in the upcoming analog upcycle and achieve strong free cash flow generation. Stifel anticipates multiple tailwinds supporting the company's outlook.

feed.title: Prologis Inc stock: Why logistics real estate powers your portfolio now
feed.summary: Prologis Inc. is highlighted as a leading logistics real estate investment trust (REIT) vital for a world increasingly reliant on e-commerce and efficient supply chains. The article emphasizes Prologis's role as the largest owner of logistics properties globally, benefiting from trends like online shopping and manufacturing reshoring. It suggests that investing in Prologis offers steady income and growth potential, making it a compelling option for diversified portfolios across different investor locations.

feed.title: Broadridge’s DLR platform reaches US$354 billion ADV for March
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions' DLR platform recorded an average daily trade volume of US$354 billion for repo transactions in March, totaling nearly US$8 trillion. This represents a significant 392% year-on-year increase, reflecting growing institutional adoption of tokenized real-asset settlement. The platform's success indicates expanding use cases for tokenization activities in the financial sector.

feed.title: Equinix launches data center in Mumbai, India
feed.summary: Equinix has launched its fourth International Business Exchange (IBX) data center in Mumbai, MB3, and its fifth in India. The facility, located in Chandivali, Powai, can support 1,370 racks initially and 5,475 at full build-out, with an investment of $95 million in its first phase. MB3's operations are offset by renewable power from a 26.4MW solar farm, reinforcing Equinix's commitment to India's digital future and sustainability.

feed.title: Paul Miele named Accuray CCO
feed.summary: Accuray Incorporated has announced the appointment of Paul Miele as Senior Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer, effective April 6, 2026. Miele will lead the company's global commercial organization, focusing on transformation, strengthening execution, and enhancing commercial performance. His extensive experience in medical technology, including a commercial turnaround at Johnson & Johnson MedTech, is expected to drive Accuray's long-term value creation and growth in systems and services sales.
